topic: My bathroom scale shows two weights when I step on it but I weigh myself alone
title: My Bathroom Scale Shows Two Weights When I Step On It | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My bathroom scale shows two numbers when I step on it. Mine, and a heavier one. I weigh alone.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a digital bathroom scale displaying two stacked numbers, bare feet on it, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Digital scale. Tile bathroom. I check my weight each morning.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small tiled bathroom at morning, a digital scale on the floor, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a digital scale showing a single weight reading, bare feet, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning it blinked twice. My weight, then a second, forty pounds more.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a digital scale display blinking between two different weight numbers, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of an empty digital scale on tile still showing two numbers, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It read both even with the bathroom empty.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty bathroom with a lit scale on the floor reading numbers, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a new boxed bathroom scale on a tile floor, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same thing. Mine, then the heavier one, gaining each day.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a scale showing two weights, the larger number higher, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The second weight climbs as if someone is standing closer behind me.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a scale display with a rising second number, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week both numbers showed while I stood off the scale, in the doorway.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person standing in a bathroom doorway while the scale on the floor glows with numbers, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of an empty bathroom corner where a scale used to be, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now the bathroom tile creaks under a weight each morning, right where I used to stand.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a bathroom floor tile with faint pressure marks as if weighted, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
